text: Please select the device you want to securely wipe.
Choose wipe mode: Dry run (safe) or Real wipe (dangerous, for lab/test devices only).
Select the wipe method: Overwrite, ATA Secure Erase, NVMe Sanitize, or Crypto-Erase.
Are you sure you want to wipe this device? Please confirm to proceed.
An error occurred. Please check the logs or contact support.
Your certificate has been generated successfully.
